# clearify usage guide for AI agents

`clearify` is a privacy-first, **100% client-side** image & video toolbox — a
Next.js App Router SPA deployed as static assets to Cloudflare Pages. Three
tools each run a full decode → transform → encode pipeline **in the browser**:
`/bg` (background removal via Transformers.js on WebGPU, WASM fallback),
`/squish` (image compression via jSquash WebAssembly codecs), `/compress`
(video compression via `mediabunny` / WebCodecs). There is **no backend** — no
API routes, no server actions, no middleware, no `runtime` export, no server
DB — and no file is ever uploaded.

Primary docs:

- README: ./README.md
- Design spec (authoritative): ./DESIGN.md
- Next config: ./next.config.ts

Part of the `@cdlab/projects-monorepo`; run all commands from the repo root with
`pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify <script>`.

## CRITICAL — route ↔ tool mapping (do not trust older README prose)

- `/squish` = **IMAGE** compression (jSquash WASM). NOT video.
- `/compress` = **VIDEO** compression (`mediabunny` / WebCodecs). NOT image.
- `/bg` = background removal (Transformers.js).
- The landing page `src/app/page.tsx` (`Image Squish` → `/squish`, `Video
  Compress` → `/compress`) is the correct reference; verify against it.
- The video engine is **`mediabunny` / WebCodecs**, NOT FFmpeg.wasm (no ffmpeg
  dependency exists). Batch ZIP is **`@cdlab/utils`** `downloadFilesAsZip`, NOT
  jszip (no jszip dependency exists).

## Architecture / data flow

- All four route pages are `'use client'`. `src/app/layout.tsx` is the only
  layout (fonts, JSON-LD, `GoogleAnalytics` `G-FPHG7CDDVQ`, `IKHeader`,
  `Toaster`). No `src/app/api/`.
- Files are read with `URL.createObjectURL` and processed in-tab. Outbound
  network is ONLY: Hugging Face Hub (model weights, `/bg`), Cloudinary (sample
  images), Google Analytics. Never user files.
- **Three different concurrency models — do not unify them:** `/squish` = bounded
  parallel queue (3); `/bg` = strictly sequential; `/compress` = single file.

## Key files (with paths)

- `src/app/{page,bg/page,squish/page,compress/page}.tsx` — landing + 3 tools.
- `src/hooks/useImageQueue.ts` — the `/squish` queue, `MAX_PARALLEL_PROCESSING = 3`.
- `src/lib/wasm.ts` — `ensureWasmLoaded(format)`: lazy dynamic-import `@jsquash/*`,
  memoized in a `Map`.
- `src/lib/imageProcessing.ts` — `decode` / `encode` / `getFileType`. AVIF
  `effort:4`; PNG lossless (ignores quality); `getFileType` maps `jpeg`→`jpg`,
  `.jxl` by extension.
- `src/lib/process.ts` — background-removal engine: model cascade + WebGPU/iOS
  handling.
- `src/lib/storage.ts` — IndexedDB stores (`clearify-bg-blobs`,
  `clearify-squish-blobs`) via `@cdlab/utils` `createIDBStore`.
- `src/lib/formatDefaults.ts` — `DEFAULT_QUALITY_SETTINGS` (avif 50, jpeg/jxl/webp 75).
- `src/store/{useBgStore,useSquishStore}.ts` — Zustand `persist` metadata stores.
- `src/types/{squish,compress,bg,encoders}.ts` — `OutputType`, `ConversionSettings`, etc.
- `src/hooks/useImageProcessing.ts` — DEAD CODE, not imported by any page.

## /squish pipeline (the canonical one)

1. drop/paste/sample → `ImageFile[]` (genid id + objectURL) → `addImages` →
   `addToQueue`.
2. `useImageQueue` runs ≤3 in parallel; `options`/`outputType` held in refs.
3. per image: `file.arrayBuffer()` → `getFileType` → `decode` → `encode({quality})`.
4. `decode`/`encode` call `ensureWasmLoaded(format)` first (lazy `@jsquash/*`).
5. `Blob(image/<out>)` → objectURL; `updateImage(status:'complete', blob, …)`.
6. `updateImage` also persists the blob's bytes to IndexedDB.
7. download: single `downloadFile`; many `downloadFilesAsZip(files, 'clearify')`.

## /bg model cascade (process.ts)

- `wuchendi/modnet` (WebGPU) → `briaai/RMBG-2.0` (WASM) → `briaai/RMBG-1.4`
  (WASM, cross-browser). iOS is **force-pinned to RMBG-1.4**.
- WebGPU gated on `navigator.gpu.requestAdapter()`; ONNX WASM `proxy=true`,
  `numThreads=1`, `initTimeout=10000`, 100 ms warm-up.
- `env.cacheDir = ''` — model cache DISABLED; weights re-fetched from HF Hub each
  session. The "offline" claim is the app shell, not the first matte.
- Output: mask → alpha channel on a canvas → PNG `File` `<name>-bg-blasted.png`.

## /compress (compress/page.tsx)

- `mediabunny` `Conversion`, `Mp4OutputFormat` + `BufferTarget` (in-memory).
- Methods: `quality` (preset), `bitrate` (`'2500k'`→bps), `filesize` (from
  duration, floor 100 kbps minus audio).
- Capability negotiation: `canEncodeVideo(hevc)` fails → fall back to `avc`
  (toast); neither → throw. `canEncodeAudio('aac')` false → muted (`discard`).
- Local `useState` only — no store, no IndexedDB, single file.

## Persistence

- Zustand `persist` (localStorage keys `clearify-bg-images`,
  `clearify-squish-images`): `partialize` keeps ONLY `status:'complete'` items,
  strips `file`/`preview`/`blob`/objectURLs.
- Blobs live in IndexedDB. `rehydrateBlobs()` reloads bytes + rebuilds
  objectURLs on reload; missing blob → `status:'error', error:'Data lost'`.

## Config & bindings

- NO env vars, NO secrets, NO bindings, NO server DB. Only build-time input:
  `BUILD_TIME` (`next.config.ts` → logged to console by `IKVersionInfo`).
- `next.config.ts`: `images.unoptimized:true` (required for CF Pages),
  remotePatterns (`res.cloudinary.com`, `wcd.pages.dev`), `allowedDevOrigins`.

## Gotchas for agents

- `build`/`dev` MUST keep `--webpack` — the WASM + worker mix does not build
  under Turbopack. Do not remove the flag.
- Do not describe FFmpeg.wasm (video is `mediabunny`) or jszip (ZIP is
  `@cdlab/utils`) — neither dependency exists.
- Do not unify the three tools' concurrency/persistence — they differ on purpose.
- `src/hooks/useImageProcessing.ts` is dead code; the live path is `useImageQueue`.
- There is NO test script and NO test files. Do not invent `pnpm … test`.
- jSquash WASM is lazy per format (first use pays the load; memoized after).

## Common commands

```bash
pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify dev         # http://clearify.localhost:3355 (via nsl)
pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify build       # next build --webpack
pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify build:cf    # @cloudflare/next-on-pages build
pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify lint        # next lint
pnpm --filter @cdlab/clearify typecheck   # tsc --noEmit
```
